innateAbility.name: Forbidden Knowledge
innateAbility.description: Starts the game with a neutral consumable item — Eldwurm's Edda.This can be consumed after a certain period of time to grant Auroth bonus intelligence corresponding to its current intelligence.

abilities.name: Arctic Burn
abilities.description: Sets Auroth's attack point to a certain value, and grants herself unobstructed movement and bonus attack range.

abilities.name: Splinter Blast
abilities.description: Launches a projectile towards a unit and shatters on impact, leaving the primary target completely unaffected, while hurling damaging splinters to enemy units within the radius and slowing them.

abilities.name: Cold Embrace
abilities.description: Encases the affected allied unit in a cocoon, healing it while preventing all physical damage instances.

abilities.name: Winter's Curse
abilities.description: Dispels and stuns an enemy unit in place.Enemy units within the radius are striken with a maddening curse that causes them to attack their frozen ally with increased attack speed.
